Skill Path: Unconventional Treatment

You are a strong advocate for alternative, esoteric treatments.

While developing your skills in Medicine you chose to focus specifically on Unconventional Treatment, learning basic techniques.You gain the following trained feats: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.SC95hfEEHQs7E9cG]{Acupuncturist}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.X4T7pO25YgW5lHWJ]{Vasodilation}.

This path focuses on @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{Treat Wounds}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.TC7OcDa7JlWbqMaN]{Treat Disease}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.KjoCEEmPGTeFE4hh]{Treat Poison}.

Path Progression

  • Trained: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.SC95hfEEHQs7E9cG]{Acupuncturist}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.X4T7pO25YgW5lHWJ]{Vasodilation}
  • Expert: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.RlFZ648UR0Q0YECL]{Chromotherapy}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.rLwzwcrLh1qaN4pk]{Unusual Treatment}
  • Master: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.17FAYfreumeKbSGr]{Advanced First Aid}
  • Legendary: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.Kk4AMZtpQnLEgN0b]{Legendary Medic}
